Method Details
REST API POST /serving-endpoints/{name}/invocations
Task type Description Supported models When to use? Recommended use cases
General purpose Models designed for multi-turn conversations. databricks-gpt-5-6-sol databricks-gemini-3-5-flash databricks-gemini-3-pro-image databricks-claude-sonnet-5 databricks-claude-sonnet-4-6 databricks-claude-sonnet-4 databricks-glm-5-2 Conversational use cases
Embeddings Models that transform text into vectors. databricks-qwen3-embedding-0-6b databricks-gte-large-en Semantic retrieval
Vision Models that process images. databricks-gemini-3-pro-image Image understanding
Reasoning Models for complex reasoning. databricks-gpt-5-6-soldatabricks-glm-5-2 Reasoning workflows
